map.name: F_announced_det_m2
map.construction: Announced seed Keller map (charter App. A / Ulam Thm 3.1). A=1+xy, B=A^2 z+y^2(4+3xy), (P,Q,R)=(AB, y+3xB, R).

geometry_placeholders.discriminant_nonproper_set: preprint Delta^+ / S_F — not re-certified in atlas bootstrap
geometry_placeholders.omitted_set: preprint Gamma = C^3 \ F(C^3) — not re-certified in atlas bootstrap

placeholders.poisson_lift_Phi: G2 CERTIFIED (pilot): Phi(q,p)=(F(q), J(q)^{-T} p); B polynomial; Poisson brackets on generators dual-CAS; non-injectivity lift; mu(Phi)=3 partial fiberwise. See docs/validation/G2-poisson-A001-dossier.md and data/anchor/Phi_A001_seed_d3.json
placeholders.weyl_formula: G3 TODO: Q_i=F_i(q), P_j = sum B_{ij}(q) p_j as Weyl gens; not proved in this row
placeholders.star_domain_status: G4 TODO: domains / self-adjointness / strong CCR; not started

composition_notes: Base factor for Cor 5.3 family (Thm 5.2). Composites/iterates not registered in bootstrap. Cotangent lift Phi registered under poisson_lift.
non_claims: Classical Poisson on T*A^3 only — not Weyl/CCR/physical
mu(Phi)=3 is partial (fiberwise); not a full C^6 generic-degree formalization
Does not claim factory-false slogan as Quantyra theorem
